title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Responsible Business Conduct) (Second Amendment) Directions, 2026
description: RBI tightened norms on compulsory bundling of third-party products, mandated explicit customer consent for product sales, and made banks liable for mis-selling. The final directions prohibit dark patterns in digital interfaces, require clear disclosure of product features, and mandate compensation refunds for established mis-selling cases. Effective January 1, 2027.
